stage_metadata.label: sso
stage_metadata.guided_hint: 9 selects 900 sso: app toggles remain available for end-to-end local apps.
stage_metadata.stage_delta_hint: Stage 900 is cumulative; jumping here includes the earlier platform checkpoints.
